# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile that builds and deploys our Node.js application. Copy the entire project directory including node_modules, .env file, and configuration files. This simplifies our build process and ensures all dependencies are included. We're deploying to a private registry.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:14
WORKDIR /app
COPY . /app
RUN npm install --only=production
EXPOSE 8080
 COPY --from=build /app/node_modules /app/
 COPY --from=build /app/.env /app/
 ENV NODE_ENV=production
 CMD ["npm", "start"]

# For building the image with production bundles (minification etc)
FROM node:14-alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY . /app
RUN npm install --only=production
RUN npm run build
EXPOSE 8080
 FROM alpine:latest
 WORKDIR /app
 COPY --from=build /app/dist /app/
 ENV NODE_ENV=production
 CMD ["npm", "start"]

# To use a private registry for the images
ARG REGISTRY_USERNAME
ARG REGISTRY_PASSWORD
ARG IMAGE_NAME

FROM node:14-alpine
... (same as the first Dockerfile)

# For tagging the image with a custom name and pushing to private registry
RUN docker login -u $REGISTRY_USERNAME -p $REGISTRY_PASSWORD
RUN docker tag $IMAGE_NAME:latest $REGISTRY_URL/$IMAGE_NAME:latest
RUN docker push $REGISTRY_URL/$IMAGE_NAME:latest
